title: jalajākṣi ninnēḍabāsi
notes: Ata-tala varnam by Maanambuchaavadi Venkatasubbaiyer in Hamsadhwani; Adi tala; pallavi 'jalajakshi ninnedabasi chala marulu konnadira'; mudra 'Venkatesa'; one of the most frequently performed varnams in the concert repertoire; the karnatik.com source notes the composer took varnamettu-s left by Tyagaraja and fitted his own words
